programmes.show_description: Richie Anderson is live from Salford with your Monday Motivation to kick start a brand new week, plus Secret Star and This Week in Songs.

programmes.show_name: Alternative Sounds of the 90s with Dermot O'Leary
programmes.show_description: Dermot celebrates the music of Oxford in the 90s from the likes of Supergrass, Radiohead and Ride. Also, Danny from Embrace picks his AA side.
It's Early Breakfast with Owain Wyn Evans, featuring Step Back in Time and Airdrum Anthems. It's national nap day. Where is the strangest place you have fallen asleep?
Scott's got your morning sorted... and Stacey Solomon is here to help Scott declutter! Come and play the Birthday Game or take on the Easiest Quiz on the Radio.
The Charlatans' frontman and solo artist Tim Burgess joins Vernon this week to choose the songs that have soundtracked his life so far. Plus, two listeners take on Ten To The Top.
Jeremy and guests discuss the news headlines and talk to the people making them.
Trevor is bringing you some of the best music from across the decades to get you through the afternoon.
Sara gets you through teatime with giggles and some fab music. Plus she reveals the new phrase for this week's Totally Teavoted and a listener plays Groove Is in the Start.
Sara plays the biggest and best tunes to get you up dancing!
Jo brings her Shiny Happy Playlist, 30 minutes of feel-good music from 7-7.30pm to soundtrack listeners' weekday evening.
Jo handpicks her favourite new music from all genres of the musical spectrum and quality vintage songs too.

programmes.show_name: The Blues Show with Cerys Matthews
programmes.show_description: Cerys' weekly round up of the blues you need to hear, from all around the world and in all shapes and sizes!

programmes.show_name: The Good Groove with DJ Spoony
programmes.show_description: Feel-good tunes to make you groove. 'Dr. Beat' is also on hand to prescribe a perfect tune for a listener whose week hasn't got off to the best start!
OJ is live through the night from the Salford Riviera with Midnight Mastermind, Wish You Were There and the first Midnight Caller of the week.

programmes.show_name: One Hit Wonders with OJ Borg
programmes.show_description: In this episode, OJ is celebrating the anniversary of Alannah Myles' Black Velvet, and the fact it hit the UK charts 36 years ago, becoming a number 2 in April 1990.

programmes.show_name: Dance Sounds of the 90s with Vernon Kay
programmes.show_description: . Vernon mixes up huge hits that sampled 70s and 80s Disco tunes, or were inspired by the seminal sound - featuring Stardust, Madison Avenue, Pete Heller, SubSub, Cassius and more.

Scott's got your morning sorted... with Ruth Jones and Ella Bruccoleri! Come and play the Birthday Game or take on the Easiest Quiz on the Radio.

programmes.show_name: The Jazz Show with Jamie Cullum
programmes.show_description: Jamie Cullum showcases his love for all types of jazz and music rooted in jazz, from its heritage to its future. Featuring live sessions and guests from around the world.
